name: The Story Shapes the Agent: Narrative Priors in LLM Behavior
summary: arXiv:2607.18566v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Persona prompting is widely used to steer LLM agent behavior, yet the narrative framing of a task can matter more than the assigned persona. We iso...
description: arXiv:2607.18566v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Persona prompting is widely used to steer LLM agent behavior, yet the narrative framing of a task can matter more than the assigned persona. We isolate this effect through structural isomorphism, constructing three text-based investigation games that share the same action space, stage progression, and resource constraints while varying only task...
author: Yixuan Wang, James Lester, Shashank Srivastava
